topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)

drills.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I wish I had more money.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i had more money

sentences.english: If only I had more money.
sentences.hindi: काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
sentences.pronunciation: if only i had more money

sentences.english: I wish I were there.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैं वहाँ होता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i were there

drills.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: If only I had studied earlier.
sentences.hindi: काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती।
sentences.pronunciation: if only i had studied earlier

sentences.english: I wish I had not made this mistake.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने यह गलती नहीं की होती।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i had not made this mistake

sentences.english: I wish you would calm down.
sentences.hindi: काश तुम शांत हो जाओ।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish you would calm down

drills.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: I wish I could fly.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैं उड़ सकता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i could fly

sentences.english: If only the weather were good.
sentences.hindi: काश मौसम अच्छा होता।
sentences.pronunciation: if only the weather were good

sentences.english: I wish I had talked to him.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने उससे बात की होती।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i had talked to him

drills.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: If only I had known this earlier.
sentences.hindi: काश मुझे यह पहले पता होता।
sentences.pronunciation: if only i had known this earlier

sentences.english: I wish I had more time.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा समय होता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i had more time

sentences.english: I wish you would listen to me.
sentences.hindi: काश तुम मुझे सुनो।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish you would listen to me

drills.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: I wish I had not taken this decision.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैं यह decision न लेता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i had not taken this decision

sentences.english: If only we could meet again.
sentences.hindi: काश हम फिर से मिल पाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if only we could meet again

sentences.english: I wish I worked harder.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैं और मेहनत करता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i worked harder

drills.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: If only he had forgiven me.
sentences.hindi: काश उसने मुझे माफ़ कर दिया होता।
sentences.pronunciation: if only he had forgiven me

sentences.english: I wish I knew this language.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैं यह भाषा जानता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i knew this language

sentences.english: I wish you would speak slowly.
sentences.hindi: काश तुम धीरे बोलो।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish you would speak slowly

drills.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: I wish I had taken that opportunity.
sentences.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने वह मौका लिया होता।
sentences.pronunciation: i wish i had taken that opportunity

sentences.english: If only we had not gone there.
sentences.hindi: काश हम वहाँ न जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if only we had not gone there
